tiktok.caption: 92% of professional fund managers get beaten by a simple computer program. The math will make you angry.

youtube_short.title: 92% of Fund Managers Lose to This
title_alternatives: Why Pros Can't Beat Index Funds
youtube_short.description:
SPIVA data shows 92% of active fund managers underperform a basic index fund over 15 years — consistently, not just occasionally. The average fee gap between active and index funds costs investors $180,000 over 30 years on a $100K investment. That's not market risk. That's just fees. Here's what to do instead. #investing #personalfinance #indexfunds #401k #wealthbuilding

Follow for more wealth math every day.

hook_line: 92% of 'expert' fund managers LOSE to this
